script.source: ArrayList results = new ArrayList(); for (hit in ctx.payload.hits.hits) { def s=hit._source; s.batch_info.copied = true; s._id = hit._id; results.add(s)} return ['_doc': results];
ArrayList results = new ArrayList(); for (hit in ctx.payload.hits.hits) { def s=hit._source; s.batch_info.copied = true; s._id = hit._id; results.add(s)} return ['_doc': results];
